title: Council: Review Verdicts Need a Reaction
one_liner: Every named review finding gets an accountable decision: fix, accept with reasons, or escalate.
problem: Aspect reviews and quality grades can identify defects without changing the work. A passing grade with named defects invites reviewer optimism to turn known defects into silently accepted debt: no accountable owner records whether to fix, accept, or escalate the finding.
solution: Give one accountable orchestrator the council verdict. For every named finding, it must either fix it now by starting a targeted follow-up round that carries exactly the relevant finding text, accept it with written reasoning, or escalate it. Make the decision visible, cap follow-up rounds with an explicit loop budget, and report unresolved findings when the budget is exhausted.
